notes: Requires to use winetricks to install the Microsoft .NET 4.0. Wine-Mono replacement will not work. Once installed .NET use winetricks again to set Windows 7 version, or the game will crash. Once all settled, and clear any rundll32 errors at the first time that will not appear on next runs, the game are playable. Notice this is a Playstation One game running on a fork of PCSXR emulator, with some proprietary tweaks.
title: Motorhead
